es.title: Video: Cerebro
es.description: Si alguna vez te has preguntado cómo funcionan el cerebro y el sistema nervioso, simplemente mira este video para encontrar la respuesta.

en.title: How Does the Brain & Nervous System Work? (Video)
en.description: What Does the Brain Do? And What Does the Nervous System Do? If you've ever wondered how your brain and nervous system work, this movie has the answers!
